entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An allotetraploid legume crop serving as an important source of food, feed, and confectioneries worldwide

entities.name: TRANSLATIONAL GENOMICS RESEARCH
entities.description: Research that accelerates precision breeding efforts in groundnut

entities.name: PRECISION BREEDING
entities.description: Breeding efforts using marker-assisted and genomic selection approaches

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A precision breeding approach used to incorporate resilience and quality traits

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A precision breeding approach used for genetic interventions and crop improvement

entities.name: GENOTYPING PANELS
entities.description: Cost-effective and high-throughput tools developed to facilitate genetic studies and breeding applications

entities.name: HIGH DENSITY GENOTYPING ARRAY
entities.description: A genotyping array with 58K SNP markers used by the global peanut research community

entities.name: SNP MARKERS
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphism markers used for genotyping and trait association

entities.name: MID-DENSITY GENOTYPING ASSAY
entities.description: A genotyping assay comprising 5081 SNP markers derived from the Axiom_Arachis array

entities.name: AXIOM_ARACHIS ARRAY
entities.description: A high-density array consisting of 58,233 SNPs

entities.name: RESILIENCE TRAITS
entities.description: Traits associated with the ability of the crop to withstand environmental stress

entities.name: QUALITY TRAITS
entities.description: Traits associated with the nutritional or commercial quality of the crop

entities.name: GENETIC VARIANCE
entities.description: The proportion of genetic diversity explained by the mid-density genotyping assay

entities.name: VARIETAL SEED MIXTURE
entities.description: The presence of multiple varieties within a seed lot

entities.name: GENETIC PURITY
entities.description: The degree of genetic uniformity within gene bank germplasms and seed systems

entities.name: GENE BANK GERMPLASMS
entities.description: Collections of genetic resources for crop improvement

entities.name: SEED SYSTEMS
entities.description: The infrastructure for seed production and distribution

entities.name: FOREGROUND SELECTION
entities.description: A selection process used in backcross breeding programs

entities.name: BACKGROUND SELECTION
entities.description: A selection process used in backcross breeding programs

entities.name: BACKCROSS BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Breeding programs that utilize foreground and background selection

entities.name: SPARSE TRAIT MAPPING
entities.description: Studies used to identify the location of traits in the groundnut genome

entities.name: WHOLE-GENOME RESEQUENCING
entities.description: A method used to identify SNPs from cultivated groundnut accessions

entities.name: LEAF RUST RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance to the leaf rust pathogen

entities.name: LATE LEAF SPOT RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance to the late leaf spot pathogen

entities.name: NET BLOTCH RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance to the net blotch pathogen

entities.name: HIGH OLEIC ACID
entities.description: A trait for increased oleic acid content in groundnut

entities.name: SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: A trait measuring the mass of the seed

entities.name: SHELLING PERCENTAGE
entities.description: A trait measuring the ratio of kernel weight to pod weight

entities.name: FRESH SEED DORMANCY
entities.description: A trait related to the period of dormancy in fresh seeds

entities.name: BLANCHABILITY
entities.description: A trait related to the ease of removing the seed coat

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A breeding method using genotyping panels for efficient trait transfer

entities.name: DIVERSITY ANALYSES
entities.description: The study of genetic variation using genotyping panels

entities.name: GERMPLASM MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The efficient organization and maintenance of genetic resources
